title: Junior Recruitment Consultant/Business Development [HR Consultancy]
description:
Join Our Growing Recruitment Team at TG Singapore!

Are you hungry to succeed in sales and eager to earn commissions? Do you take pride in doing your job well, staying accountable, and respecting the structure of a disciplined, fast-paced work environment? If so, TG Singapore could be the right place for you.

What You’ll Do

  • End-to-end recruitment from sourcing to candidate placements for contract / permanent roles across designated industry/industries

  • Build and manage client relationships to support ongoing hiring needs

  • Business development through lead research, outreach, cold calls and follow-ups

  • Contribute to recruitment and sales initiatives that drive business growth

(Scope may lean more towards Recruitment or BD depending on role.)

Who We’re Looking For

  • Sales-driven and results-oriented—you enjoy targets, incentives, and seeing tangible outcomes

  • Strong work ethic and discipline—you show up, follow through, and take ownership

  • Clear, confident communicator who’s comfortable engaging candidates and clients

  • Thrives in a fast-paced, lean SME environment with structure, accountability, and high standards

  • Adaptable, hands-on, and eager to learn—you’re not afraid to start small and grow fast

  • Team player who values professionalism, respect, and a positive office culture

  • CEI certification or relevant recruitment/sales experience is an advantage, but not required

If you’re ready to roll up your sleeves, stay focused, and build a career in recruitment, we’d love to meet you.

Apply now and grow with TG Singapore.

Only shortlisted candidates will be contacted.

postedCompany.description:
APBA TG Human Resource Pte Ltd

(a wholly owned subsidiary of the TG Group)


TG Group (“TG”) is a global workforce solutions provider with an international reach in over 50 markets across the globe. Headquartered in Singapore with Shanghai Foreign Service (Group) Co Ltd ("FSG") as a strategic shareholder, TG delivers a comprehensive suite of innovative human capital solutions to help our clients achieve greater business success.

TG adopts a future-centric approach where we aspire to be at the forefront of the evolution of the future of work. We believe that human capital is the greatest asset to any institution. With a wealth of experience in the Human Resources (HR) industry, we combine our international expertise and local know-how to deliver bespoke and innovative workforce solutions.

Our diverse portfolio of client-centric workforce solutions includes Contingent Workforce Management (CWM), Business Process Outsourcing (BPO), Permanent Placements, Recruitment Process Outsourcing (RPO), Professional Employer Organisation (PEO), and Payroll Process Outsourcing (PPO).
postedCompany.name: APBA TG HUMAN RESOURCE PTE. LTD.
